provenance: Luke's 2026-07-22 answer key; every entry verified against the cited wiki page

25641.source: Ruins of Camdozaal: assembled at the sacred forge from barronite handle + barronite guard (golem drops) + barronite head (crushed barronite deposits); requires Below Ice Mountain

21439.source: Larxus in the Champions' Guild basement, after defeating every champion in the Champions' Challenge

24868.what: Golden Armadyl godsword special attack recolour — 75 Last Man Standing points; toggle at Justine's stuff for the Last Shopper Standing

24869.what: Golden Bandos godsword special attack recolour — 75 Last Man Standing points; toggle at Justine's stuff for the Last Shopper Standing

24870.what: Golden Saradomin godsword special attack recolour — 75 Last Man Standing points; toggle at Justine's stuff for the Last Shopper Standing

24871.what: Golden Zamorak godsword special attack recolour — 75 Last Man Standing points; toggle at Justine's stuff for the Last Shopper Standing

32110.source: Trader Stan, in exchange for all 5 different tradeable boat paints at once (min ~73 Sailing for ironmen — Salvor's paint needs mercenary shipwrecks)

Amulet of the eye.detail: Inspect the tarnished locket, then show it to Phileas the Lumbridge Guide (Temple of the Eye); unlimited Temple of the Eye teleports

Antipoison.detail: Herblore 5: marrentill potion (unf) + unicorn horn dust -> antipoison(3)

Basic quetzal whistle blueprint.detail: Varlamore: used with willow logs + a knife to craft the basic quetzal whistle (see the Hunter Guild's quetzal content)

Black mask.detail: Cave horrors drop it as Black mask (10) — the charged name is why the drop join missed; requires Cabin Fever + witchwood icon

Cave nightshade.detail: Picked in the Skavid caves; used for weapon poison(++) and poison dynamite

Daeyalt essence.detail: Trade daeyalt shards to Noranna Tytanin in the daeyalt essence mine (Darkmeyer); shards mined there

Fighter torso.detail: Barbarian Assault: Commander Connad — 375 honour points in all roles

Giant squirrel.detail: Skilling pet: chance after completing Agility courses, or from marked ticket dispensers in the Brimhaven Agility Arena

Large fossil.detail: Fossil Island activities (several sources — see the wiki's Large fossil disambiguation)

Marrentill tar.detail: Herblore 39: marrentill + 15 swamp tar; salamander ammunition/bait

Medallion fragment.detail: Found on Sailing islands via various activities; the 8 fragments assemble the Medallion of the Deep (underwater breathing)

Nightmare Zone points.detail: Reward currency from the Nightmare Zone minigame (north-west of Yanille)

Prospector kit.detail: Prospector Percy's Nugget Shop (Motherlode Mine) — 180 golden nuggets for the set

Raw meat.detail: Generic uncooked meat — any of several kinds (beef, bear, rat...); dropped by the matching animals

Ring of wealth (5).detail: Lvl-5 Enchant on a dragonstone ring, then charged at the Fountain of Rune (wilderness) to (5)

Sanfew serum(4).detail: Herblore 65 + Zogre Flesh Eaters: super restore(4) + unicorn horn dust + clean snake weed + nail beast nails — the dose carries from the super restore, so (4) is directly makeable

Swamp toad.detail: Ground spawns near the swamp south of the Castle Wars arena

Swamp Toad.detail: Ground spawns near the swamp south of the Castle Wars arena

Wool.detail: Sheared from sheep and alpacas; spun into balls of wool at a spinning wheel

Zeal Tokens.detail: Reward currency from Soul Wars (up to 60 zeal per win)

Acetic acid.detail: Quest item, Recruitment Drive only — found in a bookcase in Miss Cheevers's trial

material_patterns.detail: Speedrunning Reward Shop — Quest Speedrunning reward points
Catch the impling with an empty impling jar (Hunter); jars are butterfly jars treated with imp repellent
Sailing boat paint (Barracuda Trials ranks and other Sailing activities); recolours skiff/sloop trim at the Shipyard schematics board
Built as a flatpack on a Construction workbench in the POH Workshop
Watered seedling: use a watering can on the seedling; it grows into a sapling
Tree seed planted in a filled plant pot (gardening trowel in inventory)
Mage Training Arena reward shop (pizazz points)
Tier 5 soldier at the Shayzien Combat Ring (defeat 5 times for the set)

not_materials.Toxic staff of the dead#Charged: a weapon (charged toxic staff of the dead), not a material
not_materials.Trident of the seas#Charged: a weapon (charged trident of the seas), not a material
not_materials.Trident of the swamp#Charged: a weapon (charged trident of the swamp), not a material
not_materials.Venator bow#Charged: a weapon (charged venator bow), not a material

wont_fix.(degraded/versioned variants): Luke: degraded barrows pieces are never desired — no need to source them; see wiki Degradation for the general mechanic

qol_sources.Collection bag: NOT an account QoL unlock — the Barbarian Assault Collector role's in-minigame egg bag (excluded from qol.json)
qol_sources.Fur pouch: Three variants (small/medium/large) crafted from hunter furs — small: Crafting 35, 4 larupia fur
qol_sources.Gem containers: Five distinct items: gem bag, gem pouch, gem satchel, gem tote, gem sack
qol_sources.Large pouch: Runecraft essence pouch (RC 50 to use) — dropped by Abyss monsters; also Guardians of the Rift rewards
qol_sources.Master scroll book: Any Treasure Trail except beginner: 1/23 chance replacing a teleport-scroll reward
qol_sources.Quetzal whistle: Four variants: basic (crafted from blueprint + willow logs), enhanced, perfected, perfected (i)
qol_sources.Rogue equipment: Rogue's equipment crates from the Rogues' Den wall safes (Thieving 50 + Agility 50 effectively)
qol_sources.Lunar spellbook: Unlocked by Lunar Diplomacy (swap at the Astral altar)
qol_sources.Arceuus spellbook: Unlocked via Arceuus favour (speak to Tyss by the Dark altar)
qol_sources.Fairy ring: Network unlocked during Fairytale II - Cure a Queen (started); dramen/lunar staff to use (elite Lumbridge diary removes the staff need)
qol_sources.Spirit tree: Network unlocked by Tree Gnome Village
qol_sources.Gnome glider: Network unlocked by The Grand Tree
qol_sources.Kourend castle teleport: Unlocked by reading the transportation incantation from Kharedst's memoirs quest series

Gem bag|Prospector Percy's Nugget Shop.why: wiki storeline bucket says 80 but the item page prose and the in-game price are 100 golden nuggets (verified 2026-07-23; Luke's report)
